greeting.text: Well met, traveller. Bring me herbs and I'll brew you something useful.

brew.text: Gather wild herbs and glowcap mushrooms, then type BREW here and I'll turn them into potions.

herbs.text: Wild herbs grow along this very trail, and glowcaps sprout north among the tangled undergrowth. GATHER what you can.

end.text: May your vials never run dry.
